_meta.description: SINGLE-MONTH health premium by insurer and carrier type, computed from adjacent printed cumulatives of the GI Council Segment-wise Report monthly editions (single month = YTD(m) − YTD(m−1) within the same fiscal year; April IS its own cumulative). One row per period × entity × carrier_group, period labelled the way the workbook template names monthly columns (e.g. 'May-FY26'). A cumulative that falls versus the prior month (a restatement between editions) leaves that field null with a warning — never smoothed. The newest GIC statement of each underlying cumulative wins before differencing. Missing is never zero.
_meta.notes: Filled by scripts/ingest/ingest-gicouncil-segment-annual.ts from every monthly edition in data/raw/gicouncil/segment/. Feeds the Q1'26 GWP tab's single-month input columns (and any future quarter tab using the same period labels).
